ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" INTEGER /* Foreign key to workclasses table */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual in the sample */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Foreign key to education_levels table */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numerical code for the education level */,
  "marital_status" INTEGER /* Foreign key to marital_statuses table */,
  "occupation" INTEGER /* Foreign key to occupations table */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status with the head of household */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "country" INTEGER /* Foreign key to countries table */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Foreign key to salaries table */,
  "hours_per_week_category" TEXT /* Categorical representation of hours worked per week */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the individual */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Primary source of income */,
  "tax_filing_status" TEXT /* Tax filing status of the individual */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the individual's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_salary FOREIGN KEY ("salary") REFERENCES salaries ("salary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass */,
  "is_federal" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the workclass is federal */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary of individuals in this workclass */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the workclass record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numerical code for the education level */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree */,
  "is_advanced" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the education level is advanced */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the education level record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "is_married" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the marital status implies marriage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the marital status record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the occupation */,
  "average_hours_per_week" REAL /* Average hours worked per week by individuals in this occupation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the occupation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary category */,
  "salary_name" TEXT /* Name of the salary category */,
  "minimum_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary in the category */,
  "maximum_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary in the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the salary record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id")
)
